id: btc_1
eth_1
# Example: DCA - buy a fixed FIAT amount at a scheduled date/time
# On the trigger_datetime, buys 100 (quote currency) of BTC as a trailing stop
# Example: Chained orders - buy low, then sell high
# btc_buy,XXBTZUSD,100000,below,buy,0.01,2.0,true,btc_sell,,,,,,
# btc_sell,XXBTZUSD,120000,above,sell,0.01,2.0,false,,,,,,,
# When btc_buy fills, btc_sell will be automatically enabled
# id: Unique identifier for this configuration
# pair: Kraken trading pair (XXBTZUSD for BTC/USD, XETHZUSD for ETH/USD)
# threshold_price: Price threshold that triggers the TSL order (price lines only)
# threshold_type: "above" or "below" - condition for threshold (price lines only)
# direction: "buy" or "sell" - direction of TSL order
# volume: Amount to trade (price lines; mutually exclusive with fiat_amount)
# trailing_offset_percent: Trailing stop offset as percentage (e.g., 5.0 for 5%)
# enabled: "true", "false", "paused", or "canceled" - order status
# linked_order_id: (Optional) ID of order to enable when this order fills
# trigger_type: "price" (default) or "date" - how the line is triggered
# trigger_datetime: (DCA) ISO-8601 date/time in UTC to trigger, e.g. 2025-01-01T00:00:00Z
# fiat_amount: (DCA) Amount of quote currency to spend; volume = fiat_amount / price
# order_id: (Auto-filled) Kraken order ID when order is triggered
# trigger_time: (Auto-filled) Timestamp when order was triggered
# trigger_price: (Auto-filled) Price at which order was triggered
# note: (Optional) Free-form note preserved when configs are edited or triggered
